title: coap_keys.c: decode_key_put_cbor skips non-string values without advancing position
close_reason: Fixed: Added proper CBOR value skipping in decode_key_put_cbor. When encountering non-text-string values, the parser now correctly advances pos past integers (major types 0,1), byte strings (major type 2), and simple values (major type 7) instead of leaving pos pointing at the value byte.
